'''zholavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eucapnic|eucapnic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eucapnic|eucapnic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zholavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zholavithi|zholavithi]] || [[word:zholaviji|zholaviji]] || [[word:zholavishi|zholavishi]] || [[word:zholaviki|zholaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zholavuthuthu|zholavuthuthu]] || [[word:zholavujuju|zholavujuju]] || [[word:zholavushushu|zholavushushu]] || [[word:zholavukuku|zholavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zholavuthu|zholavuthu]] || [[word:zholavuju|zholavuju]] || [[word:zholavushu|zholavushu]] || [[word:zholavuku|zholavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zholavufthuf|zholavufthuf]] || [[word:zholavufjuf|zholavufjuf]] || [[word:zholavufshuf|zholavufshuf]] || [[word:zholavufkuf|zholavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zholavethe|zholavethe]] || [[word:zholaveje|zholaveje]] || [[word:zholaveshe|zholaveshe]] || [[word:zholaveke|zholaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zholavothotho|zholavothotho]] || [[word:zholavojojo|zholavojojo]] || [[word:zholavoshosho|zholavoshosho]] || [[word:zholavokoko|zholavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zholavotho|zholavotho]] || [[word:zholavojo|zholavojo]] || [[word:zholavosho|zholavosho]] || [[word:zholavoko|zholavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zholavofthof|zholavofthof]] || [[word:zholavofjof|zholavofjof]] || [[word:zholavofshof|zholavofshof]] || [[word:zholavofkof|zholavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfthĂŻf|zholavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfjĂŻf|zholavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfshĂŻf|zholavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfkĂŻf|zholavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zholavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zholavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zholavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zholavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfthĂŻf|zholavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfjĂŻf|zholavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfshĂŻf|zholavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfkĂŻf|zholavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfthĂŻf|zholavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfjĂŻf|zholavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfshĂŻf|zholavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zholavĂŻfkĂŻf|zholavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zholavĂŠthĂŠ|zholavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zholavĂŠjĂŠ|zholavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zholavĂŠshĂŠ|zholavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zholavĂŠkĂŠ|zholavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zholavathatha|zholavathatha]] || [[word:zholavajaja|zholavajaja]] || [[word:zholavashasha|zholavashasha]] || [[word:zholavakaka|zholavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zholavatha|zholavatha]] || [[word:zholavaja|zholavaja]] || [[word:zholavasha|zholavasha]] || [[word:zholavaka|zholavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zholavafthaf|zholavafthaf]] || [[word:zholavafjaf|zholavafjaf]] || [[word:zholavafshaf|zholavafshaf]] || [[word:zholavafkaf|zholavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zholavasha|zholavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zholavshĂ«sha|zholavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zholavrosha|zholavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zholavmusha|zholavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zholavyasha|zholavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozholavnkshĂ«sha|gozholavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozholavnkrosha|gozholavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozholavnkmusha|gozholavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozholavnkyasha|gozholavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zholalavasha|zholalavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zholalavshĂ«sha|zholalavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zholalavrosha|zholalavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zholalavmusha|zholalavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zholalavyasha|zholalavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozholalavnkshĂ«sha|gozholalavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozholalavnkrosha|gozholalavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozholalavnkmusha|gozholalavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozholalavnkyasha|gozholalavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhelĂŠvasha|zhelĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhelĂŠvshĂ«sha|zhelĂŠvshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhelĂŠvrosha|zhelĂŠvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhelĂŠvmusha|zhelĂŠvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhelĂŠvyasha|zhelĂŠvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhelĂŠvnkshĂ«sha|gozhelĂŠvnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhelĂŠvnkrosha|gozhelĂŠvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhelĂŠvnkmusha|gozhelĂŠvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhelĂŠvnkyasha|gozhelĂŠvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zholfavasha|zholfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zholfavshĂ«sha|zholfavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zholfavrosha|zholfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zholfavmusha|zholfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zholfavyasha|zholfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozholfavnkshĂ«sha|gozholfavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozholfavnkrosha|gozholfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozholfavnkmusha|gozholfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozholfavnkyasha|gozholfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
